{% load static %} Import Product Guide

How to Import Products

Follow these simple steps to import your products into the system.

Step 1: Download Demo CSV

Click the button below to download a demo CSV file with the correct structure.

Download Demo CSV
Step 2: Fill in Product Data

Open the downloaded file and fill in your product details. The following fields are mandatory:

  • product_name
  • regular_price
  • category
  • quantity (qty)
  • tax_category
  • tax_percentage

Other fields are optional, but mandatory fields must not be left empty in the CSV file.

Step 3: Upload the File

Go to the Import Products page, choose the filled CSV file, and click on the Next: Map Headers button.

Step 4: Select Headers from the Dropdown

Choose the correct headers from the dropdown to match your CSV columns. The system will then check and validate your data.

Step 5: Review and Generate Product Images

If all data is valid, you'll see a checkbox " I want to review and generate new product images." If you check it, a "Generate Product Images" button will appear. Click it to create images for your products.

Step 6: Save Products to Database

After generating images (or skipping that step), click the "Save to Database" button to complete the import process.

How to Fill the CSV File
